sections.paragraph:
ϰρίσις, εως, ἡ [κρίνω]

—1. ‘scrutiny of conduct’

—a. w. focus on intrinsic evaluation judgment Mt 10:15; Lk 10:14; 11:32; J 5:22, 27; 12:31; 16:11; Hb 9:27; 1 J 4:17; Jd 6; Rv 14:7.

—b. w. focus on procedural and principally pejorative aspect, mostly in legal sense, judgment Mt 23:33; J 5:24, 29; 2 Th 1:5; 1 Ti 5:24; Hb 10:27; Js 2:13; 5:12; 2 Pt 2:4; Jd 15; Rv 16:7; 18:10; 19:2.

—2. by metonymy, of a local court (esp. in Israelite tradition) responsible for administration of justice, tribunal Mt 5:21f.

—3. of saving help, judgment Mt 12:18. In related vein

—4. of responsible/right decision, judgment Lk 11:42; Ac 8:33.
